tagline: Built for Florida Living. Designed with Precision.

hero.headline: 28 Years Building Dream Pools
hero.subheadline: Since 1997, Anything Wet Pools & Spas has built over 10,000 custom pools across Palm Beach County. Owner Pat is on every job site — because your backyard deserves hands-on craftsmanship, not a sales pitch.
checkmarks: Over 10,000 pools built across South Florida
On-time, on-budget — transparent from day one
Full-service: pools, kitchens, fire features & more

services.label: What We Build
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Solutions Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From custom pool construction to full backyard transformations — everything handled by one trusted team with 28 years of South Florida experience.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom in-ground pools tailored to your lifestyle, space, and South Florida climate. Every detail designed with precision from concept to completion.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Modernize your existing pool with updated finishes, new tile, resurfacing, and design upgrades that transform your backyard into something you love again.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Fully equipped cooking spaces built for entertaining — with built-in grills, stone countertops, and custom cabinetry made for Florida's outdoor lifestyle.

cards.title: Spas & Waterfalls
cards.description: Relaxing spa installations and custom water features including waterfalls, grottos, and modern water accents that bring resort-level luxury home.

cards.title: Fire Pits & Features
cards.description: Ambient fire installations including fire pits, fire bowls, and built-in features that create year-round outdoor warmth and ambiance.

cards.title: Decks, Patios & Pergolas
cards.description: Durable pavers, travertine, stamped concrete, and custom shade structures designed to complement your pool and complete your outdoor living space.

how_it_works.headline: How Your Dream Pool Comes to Life

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: We start by listening. Tell us how you want to live outdoors — Pat will visit your property, understand your goals, and discuss your budget openly. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: Custom Design & Plan
steps.description: Our team creates a detailed 3D design tailored to your space, lifestyle, and budget. You see exactly what you're getting before a single shovel hits the ground.

steps.title: Expert Build & Enjoy
steps.description: Pat and his crew handle everything on-site — construction, landscaping, lighting, and finishing touches. Your backyard transformation is delivered on time and on budget.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1997
about.headline: Palm Beach County's Most Trusted Pool Builder
about.description: For 28 years, Pat and the Anything Wet team have been turning South Florida backyards into luxurious outdoor living spaces. As an owner-operated company, Pat is personally on your job site — not managing from an office. With over 10,000 pools built, BBB accreditation for 18+ years, and a reputation built on listening to clients and delivering exactly what was promised, we bring the kind of trust and craftsmanship that only comes from nearly three decades of hands-on experience.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Pat is personally involved on your project — hands-on oversight from start to finish.

features.title: Transparent Pricing
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. You get a clear estimate and we stick to it.

features.title: Full-Service Team
features.description: Pools, kitchens, fire features, pergolas, and landscaping — all handled in-house.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom, so we quote after understanding your vision. No cookie-cutter pricing — just fair, detailed proposals you can trust from a team that has been doing this for 28 years.

guarantee.headline: The Anything Wet Promise
guarantee.description: After 28 years and 10,000+ pools, our reputation is our guarantee. We stand behind every project with licensed, insured craftsmanship, BBB-accredited service, and Pat's personal commitment that your backyard transformation will exceed your expectations — or we make it right.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool in South Florida?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool projects take 8-12 weeks from permit approval to completion, depending on scope and complexity. Pat keeps you updated throughout the process, and we're known for finishing ahead of schedule — many clients are surprised how quickly their dream pool comes to life.

faqs.question: Do you handle the entire backyard or just the pool?
faqs.answer: We do it all under one roof — pools, outdoor kitchens, fire features, pergolas, decks, patios, landscaping, and lighting. Having one team manage your entire outdoor transformation means better coordination, consistent quality, and a seamless finished product.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Palm Beach County including Loxahatchee, Palm Beach, Boca Raton, Delray Beach, Wellington, and surrounding South Florida areas including parts of Broward County. We have been building in this region since 1997.

faqs.question: Is Pat really on the job site?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Unlike larger companies where you deal with salespeople and project managers, Pat is personally involved on every project. He is on-site regularly, overseeing quality and making sure every detail matches your vision. That is the owner-operated difference.

faqs.question: How do I get started with a project?
faqs.answer: Just give us a call at 561-432-6100 or fill out the form on this page. We will schedule a free on-site consultation where Pat visits your property, listens to your ideas, and provides a detailed, no-obligation estimate.

testimonials.name: Palm
testimonials.text: We could not be any happier with Pat and his entire crew. From our initial phone call to the completion of our dream pool, the experience could not have been more enjoyable.

testimonials.name: Sunprestes T.
testimonials.text: Outstanding service from Anything Wet Pools and Spas! From start to finish, my experience was exceptional. The team was professional, knowledgeable, and guided me through the entire pool installation process.

testimonials.name: Chris S.
testimonials.text: The entire process was smooth and virtually stress-free from start to finish. Pat kept us informed every step of the way. Our pool is absolutely beautiful.
